channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: States warned against unviable airport projects
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
FAAN MD, Olubunmi Kuku, cautions state governments on unviable airport projects, stressing economic assessments and passenger demand for sustainability.
Read More: https://punchng.com/states-warned-against-unviable-airport-projects/

item.title: NIDF posts N10.63bn H1 profit
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nigeria Infrastructure Debt Fund (NIDF) announces a N10.63bn profit before tax for H1 2026, demonstrating strong performance and outperforming benchmarks.
Read More: https://punchng.com/nidf-posts-n10-63bn-h1-profit/

item.title: CAP shareholders approve N4.00 per share dividend payout
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
CAP Plc shareholders approve a N4.00 per share dividend for 2025, a 67% increase, reflecting strong financial performance and commitment to shareholder val
Read More: https://punchng.com/cap-shareholders-approve-n4-00-per-share-dividend-payout/

item.title: FTSE Russell review not setback for Nigeria – CIS
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Chartered Institute of Stockbrokers (CIS) says FTSE Russell’s deferral of Nigeria’s reclassification is a temporary review, not a setback for capital m
Read More: https://punchng.com/ftse-russell-review-not-setback-for-nigeria-cis/

item.title: NAICOM tasks NIA on prompt claims, digital innovation
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
NAICOM charges the new NIA leadership to prioritize prompt claims settlement, market discipline, and digital innovation to boost the insurance industry’s e
Read More: https://punchng.com/naicom-tasks-nia-on-prompt-claims-digital-innovation/

item.title: New para swimming boss Adeyemi eyes LA 2028 glory
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Newly elected President of the Nigeria Para Swimming Federation, Prince Adeshina Adeyemi, outlines plans for LA 2028 success, focusing on grassroots develo
Read More: https://punchng.com/new-para-swimming-boss-adeyemi-eyes-la-2028-glory/

item.title: MEA Energy targets 3,000 jobs across 250 fuel retail stations
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
MEA Energy plans to create 3,000 jobs across 250 new fuel retail stations nationwide, starting with its first smart filling station in Lagos.
Read More: https://punchng.com/mea-energy-targets-3000-jobs-across-250-fuel-retail-stations/

item.title: No excuses: Team Nigeria fired up by world-class C’wealth Games camp
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Team Nigeria athletes are confident and ready for the 2026 Commonwealth Games after settling into a world-class training camp in Scotland.
Read More: https://punchng.com/no-excuses-team-nigeria-fired-up-by-world-class-cwealth-games-camp/

item.title: 35 players hit NTTF camp ahead int’l tourneys
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
35 young Nigerian table tennis players are at a national camp at Babcock University, preparing for upcoming international tournaments. The Table Tennis Cam
Read More: https://punchng.com/35-players-hit-nttf-camp-ahead-intl-tourneys/

item.title: With World Cup history within its grasp, the U.S. ...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: It all broke right for the U.S. this tournament: the draw, the injuries, the decisions. And yet America is once again coming to terms with a round-of-16 exit.

item.title: Grene Capital expands Jabi Lake Mall’s solar capacity to 1.5MWp
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Grene Capital boosts Jabi Lake Mall’s solar capacity to 1.5MWp, enhancing resilience and reducing carbon emissions. Learn about Nigeria’s first solar-power
Read More: https://punchng.com/grene-capital-expands-jabi-lake-malls-solar-capacity-to-1-5mwp/

item.title: Swiss overcome penalty 'curse' to oust Colombia
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Switzerland manager Murat Yakin expressed his delight at breaking the country's penalty "curse" after beating Colombia in a shootout Tuesday to reach the quarterfinals of the World Cup.

item.title: 👀 Mahomes, Brunson lead Argentina win reaction
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: The sports world was thrilled by Argentina's epic 3-2 comeback win over Egypt in the World Cup round of 16.

item.title: Messi saves Argentina in dramatic win over Egypt
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Lionel Messi scored in a record sixth straight World Cup knockout match to help Argentina reach the quarterfinals with a stunning late comeback to beat Egypt 3-2 in Atlanta.

item.title: Lautaro told 'emotional' Messi to enjoy 'last WC'
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Lautaro Martinez told a visibly emotional Lionel Messi to enjoy the moment following Argentina's 3-2 triumph over Egypt on Tuesday to qualify for the quarterfinals of the FIFA World Cup.

item.title: EU lawmakers eye investigating FIFA's Infantino
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Dozens of European lawmakers are gathering support to launch an investigation in the European Parliament of FIFA boss Gianni Infantino over his involvement in the decision to permit U.S. striker Folarin Balogun to play despite an earlier red card.

item.title: U.S. loss sets betting records; big profits for ho...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: The United States' run in its home World Cup led to record soccer betting handle and allowed American sportsbooks to profit handsomely when it came to an end.

item.title: U.S. men, women get equal split of $16M WC prize
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: The United States men earned U.S. Soccer $16 million in prize money from FIFA for making the round of 16 at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, where the Americans lost 4-1 to Belgium.

item.title: Arbeloa joins Fulham after Real Madrid departure
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Álvaro Arbeloa has been appointed head coach at Fulham having left Real Madrid last season.

item.title: Egypt bemoan 'injustice' after Argentina defeat
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Hossam Hassan said Egypt were the victim of an "injustice" in their 3-2 World Cup defeat against Argentina due to FIFA wanting Lionel Messi to "stay in the running."

item.title: Zelensky signs defence deals with Denmark, Estonia and Netherlands
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Ukraine has signed three new agreements with Denmark, Estonia and the Netherlands to share its battlefield-tested drone expertise, President Volodymyr Zelensky said on Tuesday, as Kyiv seeks to strengthen defence cooperation with NATO allies amid continued Russian missile attacks.

item.title: India’s Broadening Stock Rally Challenged By US-Iran Strikes
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: India’s rally in equities had been broadening, luring foreign flows

item.title: Suspect ate Chick-fil-A and interacted with Charlie Kirk staff before shooting, court hears
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The preliminary hearing will determine whether Tyler Robinson, accused of killing conservative activist Charlie Kirk, will stand trial.

item.title: VAR review: Were Egypt unfairly denied a pivotal g...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Mostafa Ziko thought he had put his team up 2-0, but the video assistant intervened. Was it the correct call?

item.title: Airtel Africa Foundation equips 200 young women with digital skills to drive Nigeria’s tech economy
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: AIRTEL Africa Foundation, through Airtel Nigeria and in partnership with the Ishk Tolaram Foundation, Co-Creation Hub (CcHub), and SAIL Innovation Lab, has commenced the DigiLeap Women in Tech Programme The post Airtel Africa Foundation equips 200 young women with digital skills to drive Nigeria’s t

item.title: Energia, Oando inaugurate host community trust under PIA
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Energia Limited and its joint venture partner, Oando Plc, have inaugurated the Board of Trustees of the Ndokwa West-1 Host Community Development Trust (HCDT) and signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with seven host communities in Delta State, in line with the provisions of the Petroleum Indust

item.title: Atiku knocks FG over padded 2026 Almajiri commission budget
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Former Vice President, Atiku Abubakar, has accused the Federal Government of allegedly inserting road projects worth billions of naira into the 2026 budget of the National Commission for Almajiri and Out-of-School Children’s Education (NCAOOSCE). The post Atiku knocks FG over padded 2026 Almajiri c

item.title: PEBEC ranks Customs among top agencies for trade facilitation
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Nigeria Customs Service (NCS) has emerged as one of the country’s top-performing government agencies in trade facilitation after receiving high marks in the 2025 Business Facilitation Act (BFA) Compliance Assessment conducted by the Presidential Enabling Business Environment Council (PEBEC). The

item.title: UN: Nigeria facing tougher battle for foreign investments as global uncertainty deepens
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Nigeria and other developing countries could find it harder to attract the foreign investments they depend on to grow their economies as rising global uncertainty, trade disputes and geopolitical tensions make investors more cautious, the United Nations Conference on Trade and Development (UNCTAD) h

item.title: Manufacturers strained, BOI’s N644.9bn intervention insufficient –Oye
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Alliance for Economic Research and Ethics (AERE) has said the Bank of Industry’s (BOI) N644.9 billion intervention for businesses in Nigeria, while commendable, is insufficient to revive the manufacturing industry heavily weighed down by structural challenges. The post Manufacturers strained, BO

item.title: Concerns grow as poor internet threatens Nigeria’s AI ambitions
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: By Chinenye Anuforo chinenyeanuforo@gmail.com   Players in Nigeria’s tech ecosystem are worried about persistent internet deficit, insisting it is stalling the country’s push to become Africa’s leading artificial intelligence (AI) hub. While several government-backed initiatives have been r

item.title: Interswitch seeks unified payments to unlock AfCFTA trade
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Interswitch Group has called for the development of interoperable payment systems, trusted digital identity frameworks and stronger digital infrastructure to unlock seamless cross-border trade and drive inclusive economic growth under the African Continental Free Trade Area (AfCFTA). The post Inters

item.title: Pressure mounts on abductors of Oriire schoolchildren
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The bandits that abducted school children and their teachers from three communities in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State are under intense pressure to release their victims following efforts of security agencies said to have identified the associates of the abductors. The post Pressure mount

item.title: US launches strikes on Iran after tankers hit in Strait of Hormuz
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The US says the strikes are intended to impose "heavy costs", while Iran warns it will "take decisive measures" in response.

item.title: NCC charges students to protect telecom infrastructure
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Nigerian Communications Commission (NCC) has charged Nigerian students to take an active role in protecting telecommunications infrastructure, describing such facilities as critical national assets that underpin education, innovation, economic growth and digital connectivity. The post NCC charge

item.title: UK, The Nest partner to advance Nigeria’s digital innovation
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The UK-Nigeria Tech Hub, in partnership with The Nest Innovation Technology Park, has launched the Nigeria Innovation Cluster Exchange (NICE), a national initiative aimed at addressing fragmentation within Nigeria’s innovation ecosystem by fostering collaboration among entrepreneurship support organ

item.title: Pemex Former CEO Victor Rodríguez Detained, El Universal Says
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Former Pemex Chief Executive Officer Victor Rodríguez was detained by authorities in Mexico City’s Benito Juarez borough on Tuesday, outlet El Universal reported citing the National Registry of Detentions.

item.title: COREN trains 200 building collapse investigators
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Council for the Registration of Engineers (COREN) has trained over 200 building collapse investigators in Nigeria. The post COREN trains 200 building collapse investigators appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: No plans for tariff hike — MTN boss
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: CHIEF Executive Officer, MTN Nigeria, Mr Karl Toriola, has assured its subscribers that another telecom tariff increase is not imminent. The post No plans for tariff hike — MTN boss appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Indonesia Selloff Lures $29 Billion South African Money Manager
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: A selloff in Indonesian assets that accelerated during the Iran war has created a buying opportunity, prompting a South African money manager with $29 billion in assets to enter the market.

item.title: JUST IN: Tangaza LG chairman resigns from APC, steps down from office in Sokoto

item.description: He wrote, "I wish to formally inform you of my decision to resign from the APC with immediate effect. This decision is borne out of... The post JUST IN: Tangaza LG chairman resigns from APC, steps down from office in Sokoto appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Messi has no equals, and if not for him, Argentina...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Argentina's remarkable comeback win against Egypt was all down to Lionel Messi, who is seemingly dragging his team to another final.

item.title: NCC earns top spot in BPSR 2026 MDA ranking
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: THE Nigerian Communications Commission (NCC) has been ranked among the top three best-performing Ministries, Departments, and Agencies (MDAs) of the Federal Government in the 2026 Public Service Reforms Performance Assessment conducted by the Bureau of Public Service Reforms (BPSR). The post NCC ear

item.title: US immigration officer shoots and kills man in Texas
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Man, identified as Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, is latest to be killed by ICE officers since President Trump took power.

item.title: Tinubu orders ICPC to investigate PFIPC

item.description: By Johnbosco Agbakwuru ABUJA— PRESIDENT Bola Tinubu has directed the Independent Corrupt Practices and Other Related Offences Commission, ICPC, to conduct a thorough investigation into the activities of a “Presidential Foreign Intervention Promotion Council” (PFIPC) and all related matters. item.title: Argentina fans hurl beer at Egypt supporters after final whistle
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: A video circulating on social media shows Argentina fans throwing beer and taunting Egypt supporters in the stands.

item.title: NFF To Organise FIFA Capacity-Building Programme For Women Administrators
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Nigeria Football Federation has concluded arrangements for a three-day capacity-building programme for women football administrators in Nigeria, which is at the instance of world football-governing body, FIFA. The post NFF To Organise FIFA Capacity-Building Programme For Women Administrators app

item.title: NMDPRA boss advocates golf for healthy living, industry collaboration
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: The Chief Executive of the Nigerian Midstream and Downstream Petroleum Regulatory Authority (NMDPRA), Rabiu Umar, has encouraged Nigerians to embrace golf, describing the sport as a platform for healthy living, relaxation and stronger professional relationships. Umar made the call at the grand final

item.title: Harrington equals record with third US senior open title
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Ireland’s Padraig Harrington produced a commanding final-round performance to capture his third U.S. Senior Open title, matching the tournament record with a four-shot victory at Scioto Country Club in Ohio. The 54-year-old finished the championship at 12-under-par after carding a four-under final r

item.title: Naira down to N1,405/$ in parallel market
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Elizabeth Adegbesan The Naira yesterday depreciated to N1,405 per dollar in the parallel market from N1,400 per dollar on Monday. Likewise, the naira depreciated to N1,379 per dollar in the Nigerian Foreign Exchange Market, NFEM. Data from the Central Bank of Nigeria, CBN, showed that the indica

item.title: ADC, ICPC clash over El-Rufai’s hospital visit, detention conditions
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The African Democratic Congress, ADC, and the Independent Corrupt Practices and Other Related Offences Commission, ICPC, yesterday traded accusations over the hospital visit and detention conditions of former Kaduna State governor, Mallam Nasir El-Rufai. The post ADC, ICPC clash over El-Rufai’s hosp

item.title: Edeh Michael wins 10th Chief Mike Nkwoji memorial golf tourney
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Edeh Michael emerged as the overall winner in Category One at the 10th Chief Mike Nkwoji Memorial Golf Tournament after returning an impressive net score of 76 at the Aba Sports Club 1926. Michael finished ahead of S. T. Ajah, who posted 77 net to claim second place, while U.C. Anuruo settled for th

item.title: Should government offices be privatised?
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: “The phrase, public office is a public trust, has of late become common property”, Charles Sumner   The Code of Conduct Bureau rightly admonishes Nigerians that “Public Office is a Trust, Don’t Abuse it!” In the same spirit, Article XI, Section 1 of the 1987 Constitution of the Republic of the

item.title: US strikes Iran despite promised pause for Khamenei funeral
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: The US launches new strikes on Iran despite a promise by US President Donald Trump to pause attacks.

item.description: The Katsina State Government says the implementation of the Treasury Single Account (TSA) in the state has resulted in the closure of more than 600 bank accounts previously operated by ministries, departments and parastatals, and that has significantly strengthened transparency and accountability in

item.title: Renaissance announces discovery of oil in OML 74
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: The Renaissance Africa Energy Company Limited has announced a discovery of oil and gas at its Oil Mining Lease 74 in the Niger Delta. A statement said the lease through its JK-004 exploration well marks the first big win under its refreshed exploration strategy. Daily Trust reports that the leading

item.title: Tariff: Auto manufacturers urge FG to protect local industry
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: The Nigerian Automotive Manufacturers Association (NAMA) has urged the Federal Government to complement its 2026 Fiscal Policy Measures with stronger industrial protection, warning that tariff liberalisation without adequate safeguards could undermine investments in the country’s automotive manufact

item.title: Unstable Manhattan skyscraper triggers collapse fears
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: An unstable Manhattan skyscraper has triggered a major evacuation after structural columns buckled.

item.title: Insecurity: Halt rehabilitations, try B-Haram members, Senate tells FG
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Senate has urged the Federal Government to halt the policy of rehabilitating and reintegrating former Boko Haram members into society, and ensure that perpetrators of terrorism and banditry are, instead, arrested and made to face the full wrath of the law. The post Insecurity: Halt rehabilitatio

item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: The Nigerian Communications Commission (NCC) has called on Nigerian students to actively protect telecommunications infrastructure across the country, describing such facilities as critical national assets that support education, innovation, economic growth and digital connectivity. The Executive Vi

item.title: Rising food insecurity, inflation weakening economy – Center
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: The Center for Crisis Communication (CCC) has revealed that rising food insecurity, and inflation is further weakening the country’s economy in different sectors. Chairman, Centre for Crisis Communication (CCC), Maj Gen Chris Olukolade (Rtd) made the disclosure in Abuja yesterday during the second q

item.description: The Nigerian Aviation Handling Company PLC (nahco Aviance) has announced the appointment of Mr. Wolemi Esan, and Dr. Julius B. Omodayo-Owotuga as non-executive directors are The appointments came on the heels of the retirement of two long-serving directors of the Company: Mr. Mr. Akinwumi Godson Fa

item.description: Despite soaring housing costs, younger buyers are finding a way in.

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Nigerian labor market currently faces a complex paradox often termed the ‘great disconnect’. On one side, employers are desperate for talent, citing a critical shortage of skilled professionals in tech, data The post How we are future-proofing modern Nigerian professionals through skill-focused

item.title: How the US-Iran conflict is reshaping Africa’s geopolitical opportunities
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: The US-Israel war on Iran is forcing African governments to rethink their security and economic priorities.

item.title: S&P Dow Jones Warns of Potential Frontier-Market Cut for Turkey
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: S&P Dow Jones Indices put Turkey on a watchlist for a potential cut to frontier-market status, joining MSCI Inc. in warning of downgrades.

item.title: Over 18m Nigerians exposed to flooding, NiHSA warns
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: As floods ravage parts of the country, the Nigeria Hydrological Services Agency, NiHSA, has predicted that over 18 million Nigerians are exposed to heavy flooding in the 2026 flood forecast. The post Over 18m Nigerians exposed to flooding, NiHSA warns appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: US Strikes Iran and Blocks Oil Sales
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: The US launched airstrikes in Iran and revoked a waiver that allowed it to sell oil globally, further imperiling a peace agreement after a series of attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg's Nick Wadhams breaks down the latest developments. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: In catering industry, best advertisement is a satisfied customer —Mike Adegun, CEO Mike and Mary’s Catering
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Mike Ayodeji Adegun is the CEO and co-owner of renowned catering outfit, Mike and Mary’s. The Ogbomosho-born Agricultural Engineering graduate, in this interview with ROTIMI IGE, talks about their journey so far and entreprenuership nuggets to succeeding in the catering industry. item.description: Marine Le Pen, the far-right French politician, announced Tuesday she is running for president next year.

item.description: the plan by the Federal Government to review the National Youth Service Corps (NYSC) scheme after 53 years of its existence is overdue. item.title: Nigeria’s endless building collapses: Time to end culture of impunity
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: NIGERIA is once again mourning victims of preventable building collapses. Within days, buildings have failed in Lagos and Port Harcourt, only weeks after another collapse in Abuja. Lives have been lost, families shattered and livelihoods destroyed. The post Nigeria’s endless building collapses: Time

item.title: Switzerland break Colombian hearts with first shoot-out success
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Switzerland held their nerve to edge a tight and cagey contest with a 4-3 penalty shoot-out success over unfortunate Colombia and seal a quarter-final meeting with World Cup holders Argentina on Saturday.

item.title: Meta’s glasses will turn off the camera if you tamper with the privacy light
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Amid public backlash over its smart glasses, Meta announced that it will be updating its glasses with a new feature that will disable the camera when it detects that someone has tampered with or destroyed the glasses' privacy LED light. The update is meant to address modders who have taken actions s

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Stakeholders of the All Progressives Congress (APC) in the Moro local government area of Kwara state, under the aegis of the Moro Stakeholders Forum, have appealed to Governor Abdulrahman Abdulrazaq as well as leadership of the ruling party to uphold fairness The post Kwara 2027: Moro LG cries out o

item.title: Demand for MTN, Dangote Cement, Others Lift Stock Market by N1.86tn
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Kayode Tokede The Nigerian stock market yesterday sustained its positive momentum, advancing by N1.86 trillion as investors renewed interest in MTN Nigeria Communications Plc, Dangote Cement Plc,  and 52 others.

item.title: Yobe Government Donates Sports Equipment To Security Agencies
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Yobe State Government has donated sports equipment to security agencies as part of its post-insurgency recovery and peace-building efforts. Presenting the items on behalf of the state government, the Commissioner for Youth, Sports, Social and Community Development, Alhaji Barma Shettima, reaffir

item.title: Show HN: Free Mermaid Diagram Editor
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: I've been slowly adding some new free tools to Moxie Docs (partly for SEO, partly to illustrate some of our feature sets before any commitment) for some reason this mermaid editor one blew up on Google rankings so I figured I'd share in case people find it useful! We also have ADR, AGENTS.md, LLMs,

item.title: Pastor Muoka receives Peace Award as crusade attracts thousands
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: LAGOS — Thousands of worshippers gathered at the Chosen Revival Ground along the Oshodi-Apapa Expressway over the weekend as the Lord’s Chosen Charismatic Revival Ministries hosted its biennial international crusade, themed “And The Enemies Submitted.” The two-day programme, which

item.title: Adeboye urges students to pursue excellence, prays against school kidnappings
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Olayinka Latona The General Overseer of the Redeemed Christian Church of God (RCCG), Pastor Enoch Adejare Adeboye, has urged Nigerian students to pursue continuous academic and personal development, warning against complacency and encouraging them to strive for excellence. Speaking during a thank

item.title: Parallex Bank Graduates New Cohort from Banking Academy
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Parallex Bank has graduated a new cohort of trainees from its Limitless Banking Academy, reaffirming its commitment to youth empowerment and talent development in Nigeria’s banking sector. The graduation ceremony,

item.title: Coronation Insurance Rewards Customers in Raffle Draw
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Kayode Tokede Coronation Insurance Plc and Coronation Life Assurance Limited have unveiled the winners of the Insure & Win 2.0 Grand Raffle Draw, following a live raffle draw held recently

item.title: Ecobank Nigeria Wins Deutsche Bank’s Client Excellence Award
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Nume Ekeghe  Ecobank Nigeria has been awarded the Client Excellence Award by Deutsche Bank in recognition of its outstanding performance, operational excellence, and commitment to delivering superior Institutional Cash and

item.title: MPC Warns Pre-2027 Election Spending Could Reverse Nigeria’s Inflation Gains
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Nume Ekeghe Members of the Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) of the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), have warned that election-related fiscal spending ahead of the 2027 general elections poses one
